title: Treatment Levels
description: The treatment ladder, describing how resources may be organised and described, from tacit and unstructured through to integrated digital constructs.

framework.description: Constant identifier for the framework these data belong to.

version.description: Version of the dataset, following semantic versioning.

lastUpdated.description: Date of the last substantive update to the dataset.

name.description: Short name of the treatment level, suitable for headings and labels.

description.description: Concise definition of what this level means.

keyCharacteristics.description: Observable properties that distinguish this level.

scopeApplies.description: Scopes at which this level meaningfully applies.

accessibilityConsideration.description: How accessibility typically interacts with this level. Free text because the relationship is nuanced.

licensingConsideration.description: How re-use licensing typically interacts with this level. Free text. Licensing is largely a cross-cutting attribute but its prominence and expectations shift across levels.

populationCompletenessApplies.description: Whether the population completeness attribute is meaningful at this level.

populationCompletenessNotes.description: Optional clarification on how population completeness behaves at this level.

typicallyRequires.description: Levels that are typically prerequisite to reaching this one. Empty for baseline. The relationship is typical rather than strict, reflecting the partial-order nature of the framework.

typicallyRequiresNotes.description: Optional clarification on the prerequisite relationship, including where order is flexible or where jumps are possible.

branchOrJumpNotes.description: Notes on branches from this level, jumps that are possible, or non-cumulative behaviour.

whatItEnables.description: Capabilities or outcomes that become possible at this level.

fairContribution.description: Which FAIR principles this level most directly advances.

related.description: External resources relevant to this level.

notes.description: Any further notes that do not fit other fields.
